Environment: Holographic constellations flickering across vaulted ceilings, bathed in ethereal blue glow, punctuated by ancient, towering stone pillars carved with alien runes.
Activities: A lone astronaut, helmet off, knees pressed into the cold stone floor, arms raised in a desperate, pleading gesture towards an enigmatic, pulsating orb floating at the chamber's center. Behind her, a damaged robot companion lies prone, sparks flickering from its open panels, awaiting repairs or mercy.

careworn.title: The Light Of Other Days
careworn.definition: Worn down by cares: showing the signs of long-term stress, tired and haggard due to prolonged worry.
careworn.example: The weeks of working hard to look after his sick family left him looking careworn.

images.prompt_base:
A conceptual sci-fi illustration. No text, no letters, no typography, no written words visible anywhere in the image. Scene: Location: The rusted bridge of a derelict space station, adrift in the void of a dying star system.
Environment: The bridge is bathed in the dim, flickering glow of emergency lights, casting stark shadows on the dust-covered control panels. The air is thick with the smell of ozone and the hum of failing machinery.
Activities: The careworn captain sits at the helm, his uniform faded and worn, hands trembling as he tries to reroute power to the dying life support systems. His first officer, face etched with worry lines, works at the comms panel. Narrative context: Worn down by cares: showing the signs of long-term stress, tired and haggard due to prolonged worry.. fields, pigs and cows scratching at the ground, a multitude of grimy children. The woman was , gap-toothed, her face lined, appearing old-but David knew she could be no. Underlying concept (not depicted directly): careworn. Style: Syd Mead, John Harris style, bright colours, high details, science fiction, vintage sci-fi illustration, inked line art, bold black outlines, visible halftone dots, screen tone shading, cross-hatching shadows, retro-futuristic design, printed on paper, slight ink bleed, grainy texture, flat shading, minimal gradients, soft diffuse lighting, balanced composition
